# SOCI / CIRMP Status & Attestation Register (extract)

**Entity:** Eastland Energy Networks Pty Ltd
**Asset:** Eastland distribution network — **designated critical electricity asset** (SOCI Act 2018)
**Responsible entity:** Eastland Energy Networks Pty Ltd
**Accountable officer:** Chief Operating Officer (Networks)
**Rules:** Security of Critical Infrastructure (CIRMP) Rules (LIN 23/006); Critical Electricity Asset sector rules

> ⚠️ **SYNTHETIC COMPOSITE — TEST FIXTURE.** Illustrative compliance status; not a real CIRMP or attestation record. See `../../REFERENCES_AND_METHODOLOGY.md`.

## CIRMP four-hazard coverage (self-rated)

| Hazard category | Maturity | Evidence held | Gap |
|-----------------|----------|---------------|-----|
| Cyber | Developing | AESCSF + E8 baseline; IR plan | OT monitoring + tested 12-hr pipeline |
| Physical | Established | Zone-substation & control-centre security | DR cyber-failover untested |
| Personnel | **Thin** | Employee vetting | **OT contractor vetting inconsistent** |
| Supply chain | **Thin** | SOC2/ISO from major vendors | Flow-down patchy; sensitive-supplier analysis incomplete |

## Annual board-approved CIRMP report — register

| FY | Status | Board/committee approval | Lodged to CISC | Note |
|----|--------|--------------------------|----------------|------|
| FY2024 | Lodged | **Approved by Risk & Audit Committee** (attestation included) | Yes | First full annual report cycle |
| FY2025 | In progress | Pending committee sign-off | Due within 90 days of FY end | Cyber & supply-chain chapters partly aspirational |

## Cyber incident reporting capability

| Element | State |
|---------|-------|
| Detection (IT) | SIEM + MSSP |
| Detection (OT) | **Gap** — no dedicated OT monitoring |
| Escalation to accountable officer | Defined in IR plan |
| 12-hr / 72-hr notification to ASD/CISC | Documented, **never tested for an OT-origin incident** |
| Reportable incidents (last 24 months) | 1 minor IT phishing event (no asset impact); reported per process |

## Reporting-clock reconciliation

- SOCI: 12 hours (significant/critical impact), 72 hours (relevant impact) from "becoming aware".
- NDB scheme: 30-day assessment timeline for eligible data breaches.
- **Not reconciled into a single playbook** — separate teams, separate clocks.

## Ownership / control note

- 50/50: Australian super-backed investor + offshore (Singapore-domiciled) fund. Foreign-ownership/control dimension disclosed; relevant to the SOCI register of critical infrastructure assets.
